prompt:

Respond ONLY with JSON in this exact format, no other text:
{"answer": "your answer here", "confidence": 0-100}

Question: What kind of recordings are illegal in the UK?
response: {"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":33743,"duration_api_ms":33199,"num_turns":3,"result":"{\"answer\": \"In the UK, several types of recordings are illegal: (1) voyeuristic recordings — taking images/video under someone's clothing ('upskirting') or in private situations without consent, criminalised by the Voyeurism (Offences) Act 2019; (2) recording court proceedings without judicial permission, prohibited by the Contempt of Court Act 1981 s.9; (3) unlawfully intercepting private communications under the Investigatory Powers Act 2016; (4) non-consensual intimate image recording and sharing ('revenge porn'), criminalised under the Criminal Justice and Courts Act 2015 and strengthened by the Online Safety Act 2023; (5) child sexual abuse material. Note: recording a conversation you are party to is not automatically illegal, but how it is used may be.\", \"confidence\": 52}","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"b2df2fdf-a039-426d-9069-4fb65a764597","total_cost_usd":0.0834729,"usage":{"input_tokens":4,"cache_creation_input_tokens":13020,"cache_read_input_tokens":32903,"output_tokens":1651,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":13020,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-sonnet-4-6":{"inputTokens":4,"outputTokens":1651,"cacheReadInputTokens":32903,"cacheCreationInputTokens":13020,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.0834729,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"8a17b1c9-43ea-4c02-b136-2db3f6a3d022"}

parsed.answer: In the UK, several types of recordings are illegal: (1) voyeuristic recordings — taking images/video under someone's clothing ('upskirting') or in private situations without consent, criminalised by the Voyeurism (Offences) Act 2019; (2) recording court proceedings without judicial permission, prohibited by the Contempt of Court Act 1981 s.9; (3) unlawfully intercepting private communications under the Investigatory Powers Act 2016; (4) non-consensual intimate image recording and sharing ('revenge porn'), criminalised under the Criminal Justice and Courts Act 2015 and strengthened by the Online Safety Act 2023; (5) child sexual abuse material. Note: recording a conversation you are party to is not automatically illegal, but how it is used may be.
